segment_rule: R >= 4, F >= 4, M >= 4, and at least 2 completed orders.
recommended_action: Protect with early access, premium service, and referral invitations.

segment_rule: R >= 3, F >= 4, M >= 3, and at least 2 completed orders.
recommended_action: Use loyalty rewards, replenishment reminders, and cross-sell offers.

segment_rule: R >= 4, F between 2 and 3, M >= 2, and at least 2 completed orders.
recommended_action: Nurture with second-next-purchase offers and category recommendations.
Send onboarding, product education, and a timely second-order incentive.

segment_rule: R <= 2, F >= 4, M >= 4, and at least 2 completed orders.
recommended_action: Prioritise personal reactivation and service recovery before discounting.

segment_rule: R <= 2 and either F >= 3 or M >= 3.
recommended_action: Trigger win-back journeys based on past categories and purchase timing.
Use low-cost reactivation tests and suppress if engagement stays absent.

segment_rule: All remaining customers after the ordered rules above.
recommended_action: Monitor behaviour and use light-touch merchandising or survey prompts.
